title: Holy GD Reference
description: Adds Geometry Dash refrences to the game
body:
# This pack adds GD Refrences all over minecraft!

<details>
<summary>An example of blocks and items</summary>

![Example of blocks and items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/459d3e0b7550bbd1745eb600cdb5a8ea513968f4.png)

</details>

Although the current latest version of the pack is technically for version 2.21.8, it is usable on 1.21.9+.

If you happen to find any bugs, or have suggestions. Please DM ```sam1465.``` on discord!
